title: verbascum × pelitnopilodes
intro: Verbascum × hybrida, commonly known as Verbascum × pelitnopilodes, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the scrophulariaceae family. It is a flowering plant that has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which provide health benefits such as soothing skin irritations and wounds, as well as reducing fever and cough. The herbal preparations of Verbascum × pelitnopilodes include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health issues.
